tagline: Crystal Clear Pools. Professional Care. Every Time.

hero.headline: Your Family Deserves a Crystal Clear Pool
hero.subheadline: Family-owned since 2014, Pool Pro's delivers worry-free weekly maintenance with photo reports after every visit. Serving Dallas-Fort Worth and Waco with the personalized care your pool deserves.
checkmarks: Photo reports after every single visit
Dedicated technician assigned to your pool

services.headline: Pool Services Built Around Your Family
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full resurfacing, our licensed technicians handle every detail so you can enjoy your backyard worry-free.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Consistent, reliable weekly service with photo reports after every visit. We keep your water balanced, clean, and swim-ready all year long.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Fast diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and controllers. Licensed technicians get your pool running smoothly at fair prices.

cards.title: Pool Resurfacing
cards.description: Transform your worn-out pool with premium finishes. Our expert crew restores beauty and extends the life of your investment.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough filter cleaning and inspection to maintain optimal water flow and clarity. We handle cartridge, sand, and DE filters.

cards.title: Green Pool Recovery
cards.description: Algae takeover? We'll bring your green pool back to sparkling blue with our proven multi-step treatment process — usually within days.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Comprehensive pool inspections with detailed reports. Perfect for home buyers, sellers, or anyone wanting a full assessment of their pool's condition.

steps.title: Free Walkthrough
steps.description: We visit your pool for a complimentary 1-hour assessment and provide a transparent quote — no pressure, no hidden fees.

steps.title: Meet Your Technician
steps.description: We assign a dedicated tech to your pool who learns your system inside and out for truly personalized service.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal Clear Water
steps.description: Sit back while we handle everything. You'll receive photo reports after every visit so you always know your pool is perfect.

about.label: About Pool Pro's
about.headline: A Family Business Built on Trust
about.description: Founded by Blake in 2014, Pool Pro's started with a simple belief: pool owners deserve honest, reliable service from people who actually care. As a family-owned company, we treat every customer's pool like it's our own. Over 12 years we've grown to serve the entire DFW and Waco regions — but we've never lost that personal touch. Every technician is licensed, every visit includes a photo report, and every customer gets our 100% satisfaction guarantee.

features.title: Licensed & Background-Checked
features.description: Every technician is fully licensed and passes a thorough background check before servicing your pool.

features.title: Photo Reports Every Visit
features.description: After every service, you receive photos and notes showing exactly what was done — full transparency guaranteed.

features.title: HomeAdvisor Elite & Nextdoor Favorite
features.description: Recognized by HomeAdvisor as an Elite Service provider and voted Nextdoor Neighborhood Favorite by our community.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every quote starts with a free 1-hour walkthrough. We'll assess your pool's needs and give you an honest price — no hidden fees, no pressure.

guarantee.headline: Our 100% Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely happy with any service visit, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. That's the Pool Pro's promise — because family businesses are built on trust, not contracts.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex, Waco, Lewisville, and surrounding Central/North Texas communities. If you're unsure whether we cover your area, just give us a call.

faqs.question: Do I get the same technician every week?
faqs.answer: Yes! We assign a dedicated technician to your pool who learns your system and preferences. You'll build a relationship with someone who truly knows your pool.

faqs.question: What are the photo reports?
faqs.answer: After every maintenance visit, your technician sends you photos showing your pool's condition along with notes on what was done. It's full transparency so you always know exactly what you're paying for.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are up and running within one week of their free walkthrough. We'll schedule your first visit at a time that works for your family.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Every Pool Pro's technician is fully licensed and trained. We're also a HomeAdvisor Elite Service provider and Nextdoor Neighborhood Favorite.

testimonials.name: Teresa
testimonials.text: All the staff has been amazing with answering questions and consistently providing exceptional communication and service.

testimonials.name: Gabby
testimonials.text: Pool Pros is the best pool service I've ever had! Every pool tech was very polite, quick.

testimonials.name: Allan
testimonials.text: The company's owner Blake and crew are honest and great to work with.

contact.headline: Let's Keep Your Pool Perfect
contact.subtitle: Schedule your free 1-hour walkthrough today. No pressure, no hidden fees — just honest advice from a family that cares about your pool.
benefits: No contracts required — stay because you're happy

footer.description: Family-owned pool care serving Dallas-Fort Worth and Waco since 2014. Licensed technicians, photo reports after every visit, and a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
footer.service_area: Serving Dallas-Fort Worth, Waco, Lewisville & Central/North Texas
